name: blackbird
summary: > Blackbird is a powerful OSINT tool that combines fast username and email searches across more than 600 platforms with free AI-powered profiling. By leveraging community-driven projects like WhatsMyName, it ensures low false positive rates and high-quality results. Features include smart filters, polished PDF/CSV exports, and fully automated analysis — all from a single CLI.

documentation.readme: > Blackbird is a powerful OSINT tool that combines fast username and email searches across more than 600 platforms with free AI-powered profiling. By leveraging community-driven projects like WhatsMyName, it ensures low false positive rates and high-quality results. Features include smart filters, polished PDF/CSV exports, and fully automated analysis — all from a single CLI.
usage_sections: Usage: Search by username Search by email Export results to PDF

function_signatures.name: configure
function_signatures.description: Configure the tool with runtime options (interface, target, etc.) before execution.

function_signatures.name: scan
function_signatures.description: Perform a read-only scan / probe of the target.

function_signatures.name: exploit
function_signatures.description: Run the offensive step against the target. Returns ok, data, error envelope.

function_signatures.name: report
function_signatures.description: Render the result into a human-readable or machine-readable report.

function_signatures.name: validate
function_signatures.description: Pre-flight check: confirm the target is reachable and the tool can run.

function_signatures.name: cleanup
function_signatures.description: Remove any artifacts left behind by the tool (pcaps, sessions, files).

function_signatures.name: chain
function_signatures.description: Take a previous tool's result and feed it as input to this tool.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone https://github.com/p1ngul1n0/blackbird; pip install -r requirements.txt. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `python blackbird.py --username johndoe`. Further invocations from upstream: `python blackbird.py --email johndoe@example.com`; `python blackbird.py --email  --pdf`. > Blackbird is a powerful OSINT tool that combines fast username and email searches across more than 600 platforms with free AI-powered profiling. By leveraging community-driven projects like WhatsMyName, it ensures low false positive rates and high-quality results. Features include smart filters, polished PDF/CSV expo.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'recon' phase against surfaces [web] in the OSINT category.
